experimental_design: we observed dramatic changes in gene expression upon treatment with I-BRD9
factor_value: we made use of the BRD9-BD inhibitor, I-BRD9
number_of_fractions: The presence of this non-canonical BAF complex is not unique to ESCs, as we also observed it in HCT116 cells.
number_of_technical_replicates: No specific mention of technical replicates.
number_of_biological_replicates: v6.5 mouse ESCs (Salk Institute Transgenic Core) and were Arid1af/f;ActinCreERT2 ESCs were cultured in Knockout™ Dulbecco’s modified Eagle’s medium.
number_of_samples: v6.5 mouse ESCs (Salk Institute Transgenic Core) and were Arid1af/f;ActinCreERT2 ESCs were cultured in Knockout™ Dulbecco’s modified Eagle’s medium.
